header.description: Read, update, write and delete data from Airtable

create.description: Create a new record in a table

upsert.description: Create a new record, or update the current one if it already exists (upsert)

deleteRecord.description: Delete a record from a table

get.description: Retrieve a record from a table

search.description: Search for specific records or list all

update.description: Update a record in a table

getSchema.description: Get the schema of the tables in a base

base.description: The Airtable Base to retrieve the schema from

typecast.description: Whether the Airtable API should attempt mapping of string values for linked records & select options

ignoreFields.description: Comma-separated list of fields in input to ignore when updating

updateAllMatches.description: Whether to update all records matching the value in the "Column to Match On". If not set, only the first matching record will be updated.

downloadFields.description: The fields of type 'attachment' that should be downloaded

fields.description: The fields you want to include in the output

permissionLevel.description: Filter the returned bases by one or more permission levels

options.description: Additional options which decide which records should be returned

id.description: ID of the record to get. More info.

filterByFormula.description: The formula will be evaluated for each record, and if the result is not 0, false, "", NaN, [], or #Error! the record will be included in the response. More info.

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

sort.description: Defines how the returned records should be ordered

field.description: Name of the field to sort on. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.
Name of the field to sort on. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.
